FERS RETIREMENT

Federal Employee Retirement Planning

The Federal Employees Retirement System (FERS) is the foundation of your federal retirement — but understanding when you can retire, how your annuity is calculated, and how to optimize your benefits requires expertise most federal employees don't have.

SCHEDULE FERS ANALYSIS →

"Your FERS annuity is the foundation. Everything else builds on top of it."

— Mike Stevens, IAR

Analysis

Full FERS pension calculation

Supplement

Included in analysis

MRA Options

Evaluated

Spousal Benefits

Survivor annuity planning

Cost

Included

THE PROBLEM

Does This Sound Familiar?

You're confused about when you can actually retire

MRA, immediate retirement, postponed retirement, FERS supplement eligibility — the rules are complex and making the wrong decision could cost you thousands.

You don't know what your FERS annuity will be

The high-3 average, creditable service, sick leave credit, part-time service adjustments — you need an accurate calculation to plan your retirement income.

You're not sure if you should buy back military time

Should you make a military service deposit? Does it make financial sense? How much will it cost and how much will it increase your annuity?

You're worried about the FERS supplement ending at 62

The FERS supplement bridges the gap to Social Security — but it stops at age 62, potentially creating an income cliff you're not prepared for.

THE SOLUTION

How We Help

Personalized FERS Retirement Planning

We analyze your specific FERS benefits to determine your optimal retirement date and model your exact annuity based on your service history, salary, and personal goals.

According to OPM guidelines, your FERS annuity is calculated using a formula based on your years of creditable service and your high-3 average salary. We ensure every factor is accounted for — including sick leave credit, part-time service adjustments, and special provisions for law enforcement officers, firefighters, and air traffic controllers.

Our FERS Planning Includes:

  • Eligibility analysis for immediate, early, and deferred retirement
  • Precise annuity calculation including all service credits
  • High-3 salary projection and optimization strategies
  • MRA determination and retirement date optimization
  • FERS supplement calculation and income bridge planning
  • Survivor benefit election analysis (full, partial, or none)
  • Military buyback cost-benefit analysis
  • Coordination with TSP, Social Security, and FEHB planning

How it Works

It's just three steps

BECOME A CLIENT
Step 1) Benefits Review ▾

We gather your SF-50s, leave balances, and service history to understand your complete FERS profile and eligibility.

Step 2) Calculate & Model ▾

Model your FERS annuity under different retirement scenarios, factor in the supplement, and identify your optimal retirement date.

Step 3) Retirement Strategy ▾

Build your complete federal retirement plan integrating FERS, TSP, Social Security, and FEHB for maximum lifetime income.

COMMON QUESTIONS

FERS Planning FAQ

Everything you need to know about FERS retirement and your federal pension.
